# HPD.ML.BinaryClassification.AveragedPerceptronLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-BinaryClassification` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.BinaryClassification`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.BinaryClassification`
- Kind: `class`

Online averaged perceptron. Updates weights when a prediction is wrong, averages weights across all iterations. The averaged weights generalize better than the final weights (voted perceptron theory). Supports online learning via InitialModel — resume training on new data.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class AveragedPerceptronLearner : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearner
```
